generator_used: OpenAI built-in image generation with an official SwitchBot product identity reference
post_processing: Centered crop from the 1536x1024 built-in generated source to 1536x960; no hardware redraw or deterministic rendering.
inspection_notes: The full 16:10 cover and centered 16:9 card crop both retain the finished roller shade and recognizable SwitchBot Blind Tilt clamp, shaft, cylindrical motor, side mount, solar panel, and connecting cable. The product rests on the oak console at realistic scale. The cover contains no embedded text, phone, interface, diagram, routing overlay, translucent panel, inset frame, progress bar, or invented extra hardware.
